descs.desc:
[WhenUse] Gain +2 [Charge] Count
At 10+ [Charge] Count, Coin Power +2

[WhenUse] Gain +6 [Charge] Count
At 10+ [Charge] Count, Coin Power +1

[WhenUse] Gain +7 [Charge] Count
At 10+ [Charge] Count, Coin Power +1
coinDescs:
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 3 [Burst]
[OnSucceedAttack] At 10+ [Charge] Count, inflict 3 [Burst] and +2 [Burst] Count

descs.desc:
[WhenUse] At less than 15 [Charge] Count, consume 10 [Charge] Count to gain +1 Coin Power
[WhenUse] Consume 15 [Charge] Count to gain +2 Coin Power
coinDescs:
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 2 [Burst] for every 5 [Charge] Count consumed by the Skill (Max 6)
[OnSucceedAttack] If the Skill consumed 15 [Charge] Count upon use, inflict 2 [DimensionRift]
[EnemyKill] Gain 3 [ChargeForceField]

descs.desc:
[WhenUse] At less than 15 [Charge] Count, consume 10 [Charge] Count to gain +1 Coin Power
[WhenUse] Consume 15 [Charge] Count to gain +2 Coin Power
[BeforeAttack] If 15 [Charge] Count has been consumed, inflict +3 [Burst] Count
coinDescs:
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 3 [Burst] for every 5 [Charge] Count consumed by the Skill (Max 9)
[OnSucceedAttack] If the Skill consumed 15 [Charge] Count upon use, inflict 2 [DimensionRift]
[EnemyKill] Gain 5 [ChargeForceField]

descs.desc:
Base Power +1 per 5 [Charge] Count (Max 2)
[OnSucceedEvade] +1 Potency when applying [Burst] for the first time with a Skill effect next turn (Max +3 per turn)

1010601.name: Emptied Thought
1010601.desc:
- At Turn End, gain 1 [Agility] per 5 [Charge] Count on self next turn. (Max 2)
- If this unit's Skill consumed [Charge] Count, apply 3 [ChargeForceField] to 1 ally with the lowest HP percentage

1010611.name: Emptied Thought
1010611.desc:
- At Turn End, gain 1 [Agility] per 5 [Charge] Count on self next turn. (Max 3)
- If this unit's Skill consumed [Charge] Count, apply 3 [ChargeForceField] to 1 ally with the lowest HP percentage

1010621.name: Cleanup Demonstration
1010621.desc: 1 Ally with the highest [Charge] Count deals more damage against targets with [Burst] based on [Burst] on target (+1.5% per [Burst]. Max +15% damage)
